skills.name: place-order
skills.description: Place a Calcium Nitrate order via REST API or MCP server — includes workflow, pricing formula, and step-by-step guide for AI agents

skills.name: get-product-info
skills.description: Get full Calcium Nitrate specifications, retail pricing (25 kg ₹750 / 50 kg ₹1,500), applications, and export details from HRSU Indore

skills.name: request-quote
skills.description: Place a retail order via API or request a bulk/export quote from HRSU Indore by email

skills.name: download-documents
skills.description: Access Calcium Nitrate Technical Data Sheet (TDS), Safety Data Sheet (SDS/MSDS), and Certificate of Analysis (CoA)
